name: Multi-Agent Fleet Authorization
description: Authorize a class of AI agents under a lead agent, with shared budget pool, escalation thresholds, and sub-delegation rules. For organizations running multiple coordinated agents.

principal_name.description: Full legal name of the delegating entity

lead_agent_id.description: Wallet address of the lead/orchestrator agent

agent_class.description: Class identifier for authorized sub-agents (e.g. procurement-bot-v2)

shared_budget_monthly.description: Total monthly budget shared across the fleet in USD

per_agent_tx_limit.description: Maximum single transaction for any individual agent

escalation_threshold.description: Transaction value above which lead agent must approve

permitted_actions.description: Actions any fleet agent may perform

restricted_actions.description: Actions reserved for lead agent only

audit_log_required.description: Whether all sub-agent actions must be logged
